name: DynaVap - The Vong X
summary: A flame-heated titanium and stainless steel vaporiser built for water-tool use, for patients who want battery-free dosing with glass filtration.
description: The VonG X is DynaVap's water-piece specialist. A tapered 10mm/14mm mouthpiece drops straight into standard female joints, so you can run it dry or through a bong or bubbler for cooler, smoother vapour. Heated with a butane torch or induction heater (sold separately), the high-mass tip holds heat for strong, consistent extractions, and the rotating mouthpiece lets you dial in airflow and draw resistance. No battery, no charging, just clean flavourful vapour from a device that will keep working for years. Suits patients who already use water tools and want to add a repairable, flame-powered option.
